programme.desc: Police discover video footage of nomadic cannibals attacking a group of vacationing friends.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Thirty years ago, a newlywed couple is murdered at the Cold River Motel in a satanic ritual; a group of true crime enthusiasts have been invited to the motel's reopening, where they discover history might be repeating itself.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Trapped by the raging storm and unable to call for help, the guests retreat to their rooms, uncertain who among them is the killer; two strangers seeking shelter hide their true identities from the others.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Fear and paranoia drive some of the guests to take part in something unspeakable.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: When the storm temporarily subsides, the guests attempt to leave the motel and find help; others try to figure out who the other killer might be.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: The guests grow suspicious when the driver that brought them there days earlier shows up at their doorstep; his presence causes a rift between the men and women, leading to a violent outburst with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Triggered by a disturbing discovery, one of the surviving guests goes mad, haunted by his own traumatic past.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A boy mourns the loss of his mother; a couple of teens sneak into a hospital and end up getting a little more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Bateman blackmails Lampini into letting him take one of the skeletons on exchange for not turning him over to the police; Jackson witnesses a strange creature lurking in the darkness.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.sub-title: The Last Tsuburaya; Okay, I'll Bite

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A siren lures a doctor into her trap to carry out a diabolical plan; a teenage girl must fight off a demonic plague when she realizes her family might be infected.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.sub-title: Time Out; The Things in Oakwood's Past
programme.desc: Tim discovers the key to a strange armoire and is warned time can't be cheated; Reports on the town with a peculiar and morbid history.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.sub-title: Drug Traffic; A Dead Girl Named Sue
programme.desc: A bus full of US citizens are taken to the Canadian border as a campaign to illustrate problems in the healthcare system; police chief intent on preserving law and order in the wake of an undead invasion.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Cassie is chased by a monster and is forced to endanger a kind stranger when she asks for help; a celebrated photographer is tormented after an award-winning photograph has more consequences than just fame.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A horror novelist's agent offers him help overcoming his writer's block, and the struggling author can't resist; Richard's wife is attacked and becomes a shell of the woman he loved, he'll do anything to help her feel better.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.sub-title: Parent Death Trap; To Grandmother's House We Go
programme.desc: Lyle is tired of his parents' criticisms; a gold digger fights for the fortune she is owed.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: The Belaskos get more than they bargained for when they move in next door to a vampire-hating suburbanite; a father and son bond by playing an old video game, but soon find out there's a reason it was abandoned.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A young couple are gifted everything they could ever wish for; an aspiring comic artist keeps hitting roadblocks.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A struggling bookstore owner finds unpublished works of George Romero, but the comics lead to new troubles; Shelby's mom struggles to accept that her baby is growing up, but hanging on to childhood relics isn't as harmless as she thinks.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.sub-title: Gray Matter; The House of the Head
programme.desc: A man's drinking habit becomes insatiable and his appetite grows to frightening proportions; a severed toy head appears in a girl's dollhouse and starts murdering.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A platoon of American soldiers finds something more sinister than war behind enemy lines; a man with a passion for found objects finds a growing finger.

programme.title: Creepshow

programme.title: Creepshow

programme.title: Creepshow

programme.title: Creepshow
